CustomField.description: This will display the attributes of this record, owner, territory and running user for QC purposes only
CustomField.formula: "OppOBC: " & TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c ) & " / Terr.OBC: " & TEXT(Territory2.Owned_By_Company__c ) & " / Owner.OBC: " & TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c ) & " / Owner.Role: " & Owner.fxRoleName__c & " / User.OBC: " & TEXT($User.Owned_by_Company__c ) & " / User.Role: " & $User.fxRoleName__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This will display the attributes of this record, owner, territory and running user for QC purposes only
CustomField.label: fxTagValuesQC
